name: proc_creation_win_apt_unc2452_ps
raw_query: any where (process.command_line:"*Invoke-WMIMethod win32_process -name create -argumentlist*" and process.command_line:"*rundll32 c:\\windows*") or (process.command_line:"*wmic /node:*" and process.command_line:"*process call create \"rundll32 c:\\windows*")
